sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9960" key="a)ntiqrw/|skw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιθρῴσκω</orth>, <sense id="n9960.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leap to meet,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:105:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">105.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
